name: Vryonoye Miaso Po-Russki (Boiled Beef Russian-style)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the peppercorns, bay leaves, parsley, and dill in a small cloth bag. Tie the bag closed.
2. Add water, marrow bones, the spice bag, vegetables, and salt to a large pot.
3. Bring mixture to a boil over high heat. Skim foam as it forms.
4. Cook for 10 minutes at a boil.
5. Add the beef roast and boil for an additional 3 minutes.
6. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 3 hours and 30 minutes, skimming occasionally.
7. Remove from heat, take the roast out of the pot, and slice for serving.
NOTE: This dish is excellent with a honey-onion sauce.
ORIGIN: Tantiana Shulenko, Slavutych-Ukraine, circa 1995 by Don Houston Fidonet COOKING echo
